hero_subtitle: SFTY provides executives with a unified compliance operating view that enhances governance, improves audit readiness, and controls operational risk across digital asset workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Executive oversight fades across compliance workflows
problem_description: Leaders struggle to maintain clear visibility over scattered compliance operations and risk governance. This limits confidence in audit readiness and impedes timely risk decisions across fragmented provider outputs and internal controls.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY consolidates provider outputs, case workflows, decision logs and evidence into a unified dashboard so executives can oversee compliance risk and governance with clear audit-ready visibility.
workflow_title: From provider outputs to governance controls
workflow_description: SFTY organizes provider checks, rule updates, case reviews and evidence preservation into a structured compliance workflow for executive risk oversight.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another dashboard. One executive view
why_sfty_description: SFTY provides executives with a unified compliance control layer that connects workflows, decisions, risks and evidence for clearer governance and audit readiness.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASP leaders a controlled layer for provider orchestration, audit-ready evidence and bank due diligence to strengthen compliance visibility and operational risk control.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance

ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for compliance executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides executives with a connected compliance view across onboarding, KYT, Travel Rule, cases and reports to reduce operational risk and improve decision visibility.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY improve compliance governance?
faq_2_answer: SFTY structures workflows, links regulatory changes to internal rules, enforces role-based access, and tracks decisions to support scalable, controlled compliance governance.
faq_3_question: How does SFTY preserve audit-ready evidence?
faq_3_answer: SFTY preserves case history, decision logs, provider outputs and evidence packages to support audit readiness and traceable compliance review.
faq_4_question: Can SFTY integrate with existing provider stacks?
faq_4_answer: Yes. SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one operational compliance layer without disrupting existing integrations.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace KYC or KYT providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above providers, organizing their outputs into structured workflows without replacing or duplicating underlying KYC, KYT or Travel Rule systems.
final_title: Build stronger compliance governance with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports executive oversight, audit-ready evidence and scalable compliance workflows for regulated digital asset businesses.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
